history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with messy, dark, curly hair is taking a mirror selfie. He is wearing a grey zip-up hoodie over a black t-shirt and black pants. He has a silver chain with a cross pendant around his neck and white wireless earbuds in his ears. He is holding a black smartphone in his right hand, angled to capture his reflection. The background appears to be a room with wooden floors and dark walls. To the left, there's a glimpse of a black, high-backed chair with wheels, possibly a gaming chair. To the right, a grey curtain hangs, partially obscuring the wall. The lighting is dim and ambient, creating a slightly moody atmosphere. The overall style is casual and modern, with a focus on the subject's relaxed pose and attire.
